original_prompt: Draft a one-sentence reply to Dana Whitfield at Acme Robotics. Their office is at 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA. Address them by name in the sentence.
prompt_sent_to_provider: Draft a one-sentence reply to Marco Hoffman at Ridgeline Holdings. Their office is at 5591 Cypress Court. Address them by name in the sentence.
live_provider_response: Dear Marco, thank you for your inquiry—please confirm that we should forward the requested materials to your Ridgeline Holdings office at 5591 Cypress Court.
